items.title: Markets End Lower as Chip Stocks Drop; Oil Prices Soar as Trump Says US Reinstating Strait of Hormuz Blockade
items.content: Major US indexes ended lower Monday July 13. Dow had previously crossed 53,000 for first time. Oil surged on renewed Hormuz tensions after US threatened to reinstate blockade.

items.title: SK Hynix Tumbles, Chip Stocks Lead Sell-Off After Nasdaq Debut Profit-Taking
items.content: SK Hynix shares tumbled over 10% in Seoul on Monday after its strong Nasdaq debut Friday. Investors locked in profits on AI memory chip stocks.

items.title: Dow Jones Closes at 52,637; Oil Surges on Hormuz Risks
items.content: Dow gained 150 pts or 0.28% on Friday to 52,637. Investors now watching Iran/Hormuz developments and PCE data. Oil prices spiking on blockade threat.

items.title: Dow Jumps to Record Closing High After Soft US Jobs Data
items.content: Dow hit record close after weaker-than-expected June jobs report, raising hopes Fed may slow tightening. Nasdaq down as chip shares fell.

items.title: Hang Seng Edges Higher to 24,213 as Mainland Stocks Slide
items.content: HSI rose 38 pts (+0.2%) to 24,213 on Monday with turnover of HK$309.5 billion. Gains capped by weakness in mainland markets and tech volatility.

items.title: Hong Kong Stocks Rebound 3% as Lock Expiry Concerns Ease
items.content: HSI surged 3% on July 8 as option/derivative expiry concerns were absorbed by market. Hang Seng Tech Index outperformed significantly.

items.title: US and Iran Threaten Return to War After Fiercest Exchange Since Truce
items.content: US struck 80 targets around Strait of Hormuz after Iranian attacks on commercial vessels. Iran responded with strikes on US sites in Bahrain and Kuwait. Oil surged. Trump threatened Kharg Island takeover.

items.title: FOMC Minutes June 2026: PCE Inflation Estimated at 4.1% in May
items.content: FOMC June meeting minutes showed total PCE price inflation rose to 4.1% in May, boosted by energy costs linked to Iran conflict. Core PCE at 3.4%. Fed held rates.

items.title: Measurement Tweaks Will Make Inflation Data Look Better
items.content: Core PCE at 3.4% for 12 months ended May, above Fed's 2% target every month since March 2021. Methodology changes expected to improve inflation readings going forward.

items.title: China, Hong Kong Stocks Gain as Chip, AI Rally Lead Rebound
items.content: CSI Semiconductor Index rallied 4.1%, CSI AI Index jumped 3.9%. China domestic chip stocks surged on localization theme amid US export restrictions.

items.title: China's Semiconductor Industry Racing to Catch the West
items.content: Huawei unveiled chip stacking technique. HK-listed semiconductor firms up 140% over past year, beating US semi index. China pushing hard on self-sufficiency.

items.title: Q2 2026 Earnings Season Kicks Off: JPMorgan, BofA, Goldman Sachs Report Tue Jul 14
items.content: Major banks start reporting Jul 14. Also key: ASML (Jul 15), TSMC (Jul 16), Netflix (Jul 16 after close). These results will set tone for July market direction.
